summaries.title: Telegram diff deep links
summaries.summary: To ensure Telegram View Diff is reliable, never depend solely on a volatile callback preview. Instead, store the git diff in pending coder job state, expose it via `/api/telegram/tasks/:id/diff`, include diff metadata in `/api/telegram/tasks`, and have Telegram buttons open a dashboard deep link (`/?page=telegram&task=<id>&panel=diff`) with an inline preview as a fallback.
